name: HWR_DI_OBJ_DEF_B
description: The File Format table stores information about the format of flat files.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table. This Stores the sequence value for the object definition.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the Object definition.

columns.Name: UUID
columns.Comments: This is the unique Identifier of the Object Definition created during object creation.

columns.Name: PHYSICAL_DEF
columns.Comments: This stores the Physical Definition of the Object definition.

columns.Name: LOGICAL_DEF
columns.Comments: This stores the Logical Definition of the Object definition.

columns.Name: OBJ_DEF_TYPE
columns.Comments: This stores the type of Object definition.

columns.Name: MAP_TYPE
columns.Comments: The mapping type of the OD, source or target.

columns.Name: DEF_NAME
columns.Comments: The definition name from open api file.

columns.Name: REF_DEF_NAME
columns.Comments: The referenced definition name from open api file.

columns.Name: PRODUCT
columns.Comments: This is the product that the Object definitionis associated with.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
